headline: Trane Technologies Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) reported what Chair and CEO Dave Regnery called “another strong quarter,” highlighted by a surge in bookings and a record backlog that management said provides visibility into faster growth later in 2026. headline: TT Q1 Deep Dive: Data Center Momentum and Record Backlog Support Upbeat Outlook
summary: HVAC company Trane (NYSE:TT) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 6% year on year to $4.97 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.63 per share was 3.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
